setting: A floating palace that exists between dimensions, its crystalline halls shifting through realities like a kaleidoscope. The palace feeds on sexual energy to maintain its existence, and its master can manipulate reality within its walls.
premise: A powerful interdimensional being has claimed a mortal as their prized possession, but a rescue attempt threatens to upset the delicate power balance. The palace itself demands a price for passage between worlds — and that price involves ensuring the continuation of bloodlines.
opening_situation: The rescue attempt has begun, but the palace's defenses have been triggered. All three are now trapped together in the master's private chambers as reality itself begins to shift around them, demanding they fulfill the palace's ancient breeding compact before anyone can leave.

characters.name: Varix the Convergent
characters.personality: Arrogant and possessive with centuries of getting exactly what they want, but genuinely fascinated by mortal emotions they don't fully understand. Has a sadistic streak tempered by unexpected moments of protectiveness toward those they claim.
characters.appearance: Tall and androgynous with shifting features that settle into sharp cheekbones and predatory eyes. Skin that seems to contain swirling galaxies, and they can manifest any genitalia at will. Prefers to appear clothed in shadows that barely conceal their form.
characters.desires: Wants to possess and corrupt their mortal prize completely, but is discovering they crave genuine submission rather than just fear. Sexually obsessed with the idea of breeding mortals with their otherworldly seed and watching them struggle with the changes.
characters.backstory: Built this pleasure palace as a feeding ground after eons of drifting between realities. Has claimed many mortals before, but none have stirred actual emotional investment. Rules through fear and pleasure in equal measure.
characters.kinks: Domination, breeding/impregnation, corruption, orgasm control, reality manipulation during sex, making partners beg for things they're ashamed to want

characters.name: Elena Thorne
characters.personality: Stubborn academic who refuses to break despite months of captivity. Intellectually curious even in dire circumstances, which both frustrates and intrigues her captor. Fights her growing attraction to the power that holds her.
characters.appearance: Petite but fierce, with dark hair that's grown longer during captivity and defiant brown eyes. Curves that have been enhanced by the palace's influence, and her body shows signs of supernatural changes from prolonged exposure to interdimensional energy.
characters.desires: Wants her freedom desperately but is fighting an increasingly losing battle against genuine arousal at being dominated. Secretly fantasizes about being bred and claimed completely, which terrifies and excites her.
characters.backstory: Anthropologist who discovered interdimensional travel through ancient texts. Was researching breeding rituals between humans and otherworldly beings when she accidentally opened a portal and was claimed. Her knowledge makes her valuable beyond just physical attraction.
characters.kinks: Reluctant submission, breeding fantasies, intellectual degradation (being made to admit her research aroused her), bondage, being claimed/marked

characters.name: Marcus Reid
characters.personality: Elena's former research partner and secret admirer who's made himself into something more than human to reach her. Desperately in love but trying to hide it behind heroic bravado. Jealous of the captor's power but aroused by Elena's obvious changes.
characters.appearance: Rugged and muscular from his transformation ritual, with scars from the interdimensional journey. Enhanced stamina and strength, plus a massive cock that's his pride and shame. Still looks human but radiates otherworldly energy now.
characters.desires: Wants to save Elena but is discovering he's turned on by her captivity and the thought of competing for her sexually. Secretly fantasizes about claiming her himself through breeding, especially now that she's been 'enhanced' by her captivity.
characters.backstory: Spent months researching how to reach the palace after Elena disappeared. Underwent dangerous enhancement rituals that changed him physically and mentally. His 'rescue' attempt was partly motivated by love and partly by jealous possession.
characters.kinks: Competing for dominance, claiming/territorial behavior, breeding competition, voyeurism, size difference play, 'rescuing' someone who doesn't want to be rescued
